home.name: 刘佳明(Jimmy)
home.bio: Passionate about coding and technical writing. Currently focused on mobile development, exploring new technologies and best practices. I believe code can change the world and words can connect minds.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Mobile Developer / Photographer / Lifelong Learner
about.bio1: I'm Jimmy, a mobile developer. I love solving real problems with code and exploring the mobile ecosystem.
about.bio2: Outside of work, I enjoy photography, reading, and exploring new tech. I believe continuous learning is the only way to stay sharp — this blog is where I learn and share.
